description: Create a lighting reference scene in Blender featuring a Nishita Sky Texture with a sun elevation between 15 and 25 degrees. The scene must include a 'Chrome' UV sphere at (-2, 0, 1) with 1.0 metallic and 0.0 roughness, and a 'Matte' UV sphere at (2, 0, 1) with 0.0 metallic and a roughness of 0.9 or higher. Save the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sky_reference_render.png and the Blender project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sky_reference_setup.blend.
